title: leptochilus hollrungii
intro: Leptochilus hollrungii, also known as the Java fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Leptochilus hollrungii include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Leptochilus hollrungii typically involve infusions of the leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically as an ointment or poultice.
